title: Announcement for Research Assistant Recruitment
content:
Announcements

Details

Date: 30 November 2017

Announcement for Research Assistant Recruitment

A RESEARCH ASSISTANT shall be recruited by our institution as per the provisions of "

Regulation on Central and Entrance Examinations to be Implemented for Instructor Posts Excluding Lecturers

" published in the Official Gazette dated 31.07.2008 and the requirements stipulated in article 33 of Higher Education Law no.2547.

1- Minimum ALES score of 70 (in the same score type as the department the candidate graduated from)

2- Minimum YDS score of 80 or an equivalent score in an exam accredited by the Council of Higher Education.

3- Candidates must be younger than 35.

1-  Application Petition (The petition must contain information regarding which department is applied to)

2- Curriculum Vitae in Turkish

3- Documentation on Education (Photocopies of Bachelor's-MA-PhD diplomas and transcripts)

4- Photocopy of ALES Score

5- Photocopy of YDS Score

6- Photocopy of ID

DETAILS OF THE ANNOUNCEMENT;

Application Date: 30.11.2017

Application Deadline: 14.12.2017

Preliminary appraisal Date: 18.12.2017

Date of Entrance Exam: 20.12.2017

- Diplomas received from foreign institutions must be approved for equivalency.

- Those meeting the requirements may submit their applications to the relevant units in person or by mail.

Doğuş University, Deanship of the Faculty of Science and Letters, No:21/34722-Kadıköy/İstanbul

UNIT

DEPARTMENT/PROGRAM

TITLE

NUMBER

SPECIAL REQUIREMENTS

Faculty of Science and Letters

Psychology (English)

Research Assistant

1

Bachelor's degree in Psychology, MA thesis on Psychology
